examples: The nose is tamarillo, cassis, fresh tobacco, fruit tea and cinnamon.
The nose is tamarillo, cassis (blackcurrant), fresh tobacco, fruit tea and cinnamon. On the palate, it has soft and smooth tannins.
William Fox-Pitt, seeking a record fifth win, is third on Tamarillo.
But William Fox-Pitt and his horse Tamarillo are not afraid of a challenge and attacked the fixed rails, yawning ditches and steep banks with gusto and won.
